family_summary: Restricted family bundle retaining Ghouta- and Idlib-focused rows only; Aleppo and Raqqa are handled separately and not duplicated here.
notes: As of 2026-03-10, this retrofit family bundle remains intentionally limited to current Ghouta/Idlib rows. It does not re-expand to Aleppo or Raqqa duplicates. Side attribution is added only where the retained source chain explicitly supports it.
